name: Ectoplasmic Caress
outcome: [AttackerName] gently caresses [TargetName]'s body with a giggle, teasingly coating [TargetHisOrHer] skin in a lotiony, gooey substance, that seductively chills wherever it touches.
miss: [AttackerName] gently caresses [TargetName]'s body with a giggle, teasingly coating [TargetHisOrHer] skin in a lotiony, gooey substance, but [TargetHeOrShe] resists the gentle pleasure.
statusOutcome: [TargetName] body starts to feel increasingly numb and unresponsive as [AttackerName]'s ectoplasm tingles on [TargetHisOrHer] skin...
